metadata.title: Contact Us | Harvestt
metadata.description: Get in touch with the Harvestt team. We are here to answer your questions about the Sustainable Bitcoin Protocol and how you can get involved.

hero.title: Let's connect
hero.subtitle: Have questions about the Sustainable Bitcoin Protocol? Our team is here to help.

labels.service: What type of partnership are you interested in?

form.successMessage: Thank you for reaching out. Our team will get back to you shortly.
